channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Daum PotPlayer 1.7.22853
item.description: Daum PotPlayer is a multimedia player has almost all the functions and interface similar, but improved markedly with KMP. Software Daum PotPlayer Stable have the special feature is the high quality playback, support for all video formats and audio modern and the presence of video codecs DXVA integration. item.title: Download Image Search - ImageSearchMan 3.58
item.description: ImageSearchMan is an Android application that allows users to search for images on the web using keywords or by uploading photos from their device's gallery. ImageSearchMan allows users to search for images using keywords, providing access to a huge library of images on the web. The app includes a reverse image search feature that allows users to upload photos from their device's library to find similar images or identify the source of the image. ImageSearchMan Features Image...

item.title: Download DNS Changer Fast &amp; Secure Surf 1.5
item.description: DNS Changer Android is the first layer of internet security that provides essential protection against surveillance and censorship efforts. With just one tap, the app will find the fastest DNS server and connect to it to improve your network connection. It is the easiest way to change your DNS and test DNS server speed. Smart app works without root for both WiFi and mobile network data connections. You can choose from the list of available DNS or change it to your custom DNS. Using DNS...

item.title: Download ClevNote - Notepad, Checklist 2.24.16
item.description: ClevNote is a note-taking and checklist app for Android devices. It allows users to create and manage various types of notes, such as to-do lists, grocery lists, reminders, and more. ClevNote is a memo application that helps users write necessary daily memos Features of ClevNote for Android Simple and easy-to-use interface Supports creating and managing multiple notes and checklists Ability to set reminders for specific notes or tasks Built-in templates for common note types, such...

Search for the exact text you are looking for in the document. Double-tap the screen to Smart Zoom...

item.title: Download CCleaner – Phone Cleaner 26.06.0 build 800011433
item.description: CCleaner is a system cleaning and optimization tool for Android devices. CCleaner for Android allows users to delete unnecessary files, such as temporary files and caches, as well as identify and uninstall applications that are taking up too much space on the device. It also includes a task kill to close running applications and free up memory. This can help free up storage space and improve device performance. In addition, CCleaner for Android also has a security feature that allows you...

item.title: Download Background Video Recorder Pro 17.3.91
item.description: This application helps you record videos in the background even when the screen is closed. it has many other useful features, such as: remote camera control with Wear OS, motion detector with artificial intelligence algorithm, baby monitoring, calendar recording and continuous photo capture. You can also control the camera with the volume button or 1 of 3 supported widgets "Big red button" - record video. "Big green button" - motion detection. "Big orange button" - takes photos...

item.title: Download Video Converter, Compressor 19.1.0
item.description: The fastest video converter and compressor on the market supports almost all video formats: MP4, MKV, AVI, 3GP, MOV, MTS, MPEG, MPG, WMV, M4V, VOB, FLV, etc. This converter and compressor supports converting, compressing, changing resolution, Frame Rate (FPS), bitrate of video files. It can also convert video files to audio formats like MP3, AAC, AC3, OGG, M4A, WAV, etc. Key Features Convert and compress your videos to almost any video and audio format. item.title: Download PrintHand Mobile Print 14.9.1
item.description: PrintHand Mobile Print is a convenient and multifunctional mobile printing application that allows users to print photos, documents and other files from mobile phones or tablets. This application supports direct printing from mobile devices via Wi-Fi or Bluetooth connection to the printer for printing without using an intermediary computer. With PrintHand Mobile Print, users can easily print from any application on their mobile device, including Email, Dropbox, Google Drive and more....

item.title: Download Avast Cleanup – Phone Cleaner 26.06.0 build 800011433
item.description: Avast Cleanup - Phone Cleaner is a mobile app for Android devices designed to help users optimize their phone's performance and free up storage space. This application provides many tools and features to clean and speed up your phone. One of the main features of Avast Cleanup is the Junk Cleaner, which scans your phone for unnecessary files such as temporary files, app cache, and other junk data. The app will then provide a list of files that can be safely deleted to free up space on...

item.title: Download Folder Player Pro 5.38 build 372

It allows users to play and organize their music files by folders, instead of just by artist or album. This app is perfect for users who have a lot of music files on their device and want to listen to them in a more organized way. Features of Folder Player Pro APK Ability to play music files by folder, making it easy to find and listen to specific songs or albums Supports many audio file formats,...

item.title: Download FBReader Premium 3.8.25
item.description: FBReader Premium is an e-book reading application for mobile devices. It provides a convenient way to read e-books on your phone or tablet and offers several features to enhance your reading experience. FBReader supports synchronization of your library and/or reading locations with the FBReader book network (https://books.fbreader.org/), a cloud service based on Google Drive™. Sync is disabled by default; To enable and configure it, use the options dialog. This reader also includes a...

item.title: Download Toolmaps 5.72
item.description: Toolmaps for Google Maps to highlight, edit and capture maps from Google Maps. Maps from Google Maps are displayed in full screen or immersive mode without any intervening objects. You can add and edit polylines, polygons, rectangles, circles and markers. You can also add colored text, resize and rotate them All colors support transparency. The app can scan your device for junk files, including temporary files, cache files, and outdated APK files, and help you delete them safely. Additionally, AVG Cleaner can analyze your device's battery consumption and provide suggestions on how to improve your...

item.title: Download Windy.app - Enhanced forecast 89.0.2
item.description: WINDY - wind, wave and weather forecast app for surfers, kitesurfers, windsurfers and sailors. Weather history (archived) 2012-2016: view wind data, temperature (day and night) and atmospheric pressure. The weather archive will help you choose the best month to go to that location.
